name: Vegetable Cheese Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the crusts from the bread. Arrange 4 slices in the bottom of a greased, shallow 8-inch casserole dish. Cut the remaining bread to fit.
2. Beat the eggs slightly. Stir in milk and paprika. Pour over half of the bread slices.
3. Layer 4 cheese slices evenly over the bread.
4. Spread the vegetables evenly over the cheese.
5. Layer the remaining cheese slices, 4 bread slices, the remaining milk mixture, and the last 4 cheese slices on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until brown.
